narrative.headline: 2022 Nissan Murano: only a handful of owner complaints, several about water leaks
narrative.summary: Owners filed just 5 complaints with NHTSA, so the sample is small. Three named components each show up once (20% apiece): visibility, the electrical system, and structure. Two of those reports describe water leaking into the cabin. No fires, injuries, or deaths are reported; one electrical-system report involved a crash.

issues.title: Visibility
issues.blurb: 1 report (20%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. The owner found water pooling on the floorboards, traced to a leak around the windshield.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: 1 report (20%) tied to 1 crash, with no fire or injuries. It describes a rear-end collision and the vehicle's Automatic Collision Notification.

issues.title: Structure
issues.blurb: 1 report (20%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. The owner reported water leaking in while driving in the rain, with no warning lights.
